title: publisher-crates plugin configuration
description: Schema v1 for the publisher-crates semrel plugin. Configure via SEMREL_* environment variables.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN.description: crates.io (or alternate registry) API token used to publish. Required unless SEMREL_DRY_RUN is true.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_CARGO_MANIFEST_PATH.description: Path to the Cargo.toml manifest to publish. Defaults to the workspace root manifest.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_CARGO_WORKSPACE_MEMBER.description: Comma-separated list of workspace member directories to publish, for Cargo workspaces with multiple crates.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_CARGO_PACKAGE.description: Comma-separated list of package names to publish, for Cargo workspaces with multiple crates.

SEMREL_VERSION.description: Release version for the current semrel execution. semrel core may expose this as SEMREL_VERSION, SEMREL_TAG_NAME, or SEMREL_NEXT_VERSION depending on phase.

SEMREL_NEXT_VERSION.description: Calculated next release version when SEMREL_VERSION is not yet finalized.

SEMREL_DRY_RUN.description: When true, perform validation and logging only without executing side effects.
